name: Polymarket + Crypto Market Data
description: Live Polymarket prediction markets and top 50 crypto prices. Returns real-time odds, volume, liquidity, outcome prices, spreads in structured JSON. $0.003/query via x402.
longDescription: Real-time market data from Polymarket (prediction markets) and CoinGecko (cryptocurrency prices). Fetch top 50 Polymarket markets by volume with full details: question, description, outcome prices, volume, liquidity, spread, open interest. Also returns top 50 crypto prices with current price, market cap, 24h change, high/low, and supply data. No API key or proxy needed. Cached for 60s. Query types: 'all' (default), 'polymarket', or 'crypto'. Limit up to 100 results per query.
